Agriculture Yard Sign Materials & Customization Options

All signs greater than 32" x 48" in any direction are automatically scored and folded. To score your coroplast signs, we cut through the top layer of the yard sign without cutting through the entire piece. The sign is then folded into an optimal fit to meet shipping guidelines.

If you don't want your yard signs to be scored and folded please visit our oversized flat shipping page or contact one of our customer service representatives at: 320-391-5300.

Please note: When ordering yard signs with different designs, text, imagery, etc., these signs will be priced and processed as 1 sign per design.

Custom agriculture yard signs are a versatile promotional tool perfect for farm businesses, farmers markets, agricultural events, and rural property advertising. Agriculture signs are lightweight, weather-resistant, and cost-effective when compared to other outdoor signage options. They're incredibly effective at promoting your farm business, advertising produce sales, announcing agricultural events, and sharing important farming information with passing traffic and local customers.

Here at Banners.com, we make designing, customizing, and displaying your agriculture yard signs simple and affordable. Our signs feature full-color digital printing on durable 4mm corrugated plastic material that withstands outdoor farm conditions. You can add wire installation stakes to accommodate single or double-sided agriculture yard signs for easy installation around your property.

Agriculture yard signs are digitally printed in full color on 4mm white corrugated plastic material. This material features hollow flutes similar to cardboard, running horizontally on a 4' x 8' sheet. The corrugated plastic material is durable, lightweight, waterproof, and can be printed single-sided or double-sided, making it ideal for outdoor agricultural advertising and farm business promotion.

Please note, all coroplast yard signs will be cut 1/8th of an inch on each side to allow for finishing. (ex. an 18" x 24" yard sign will actually ship out to you as a 17.75" x 23.75" yard sign.) If your yard sign needs to be precise, please reach out to one of our customer service representatives to discuss your specific application.

Did we answer all your questions?

If not, please give us a call at (320) 391-5300 and one of our customer service representatives will be more than happy to help you.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Agriculture Sign Materials for Outdoor Farm Display

Agriculture yard signs are printed on premium 4mm white corrugated plastic (coroplast) material specifically chosen for outdoor farm and agricultural applications. This durable material features:

  • Weather Resistance: Waterproof construction withstands rain, snow, and harsh farm conditions
  • Lightweight Durability: Easy to install and move while maintaining structural integrity
  • UV Protection: Fade-resistant printing maintains vibrant colors in direct sunlight
  • Full Color Printing: Digital CMYK printing reproduces detailed farm logos, product images, and text
  • Hollow Flute Construction: Similar to cardboard but weatherproof, with flutes running horizontally

The corrugated plastic material is specifically designed for temporary to semi-permanent outdoor display, making it perfect for seasonal farm advertising, farmers market signage, and agricultural event promotion.

Material specifications include precise cutting tolerance of 1/8" per side to ensure clean finishing. For applications requiring exact dimensions, please contact our customer service team to discuss your specific agricultural signage needs.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Finishing Options for Agriculture Yard Signs

Agriculture yard signs include several finishing options to meet your farm business promotional needs:

Print Options

  • Full Bleed Printing: Ink extends to the edge of the sign for maximum visual impact
  • 1/2" White Margin: Clean white border around your design for a professional appearance
  • Single-Sided: One-sided printing for wall mounting or directional display
  • Double-Sided: Two-sided printing for maximum visibility from all directions

Installation Accessories

  • H Stakes: Available for 10"x15", 10"x24", and 10"x30" signs
  • Beefy Stakes: Heavy-duty stakes for larger agriculture signs and windy farm conditions
  • Black Zip Ties (12"): Secure attachment to fencing and posts
  • White Zip Ties (36"): Extended length for larger mounting applications

Size Considerations

Signs larger than 32" x 48" or with combined height and width exceeding 81 inches are automatically scored and folded for shipping efficiency. Scoring cuts through the top layer without compromising the sign's integrity. For flat shipping of oversized agriculture signs, contact our customer service team.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Agriculture Yard Sign Production & Turnaround Times

We provide flexible production timeframes for agriculture yard signs, ranging from one to five business days to meet your farm business promotional schedule.

1 Business Day Priority

Fast turnaround for urgent agricultural events, farmers market deadlines, and time-sensitive farm promotions.

2 Business Days Express

Express production for agriculture signs when you need quick turnaround with a day of flexibility.

3 Business Days Standard

Our most popular production option - free standard turnaround suitable for most agriculture yard sign projects.

5 Business Days Saver

Cost-effective option for agriculture signs when you're planning ahead for seasonal farm promotions.

Important Production Notes:

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST process the following business day
  • Emergency same-day rushes available in some cases - contact customer service
  • Total delivery time includes both production and shipping time
  • Turnaround begins when file upload is complete and approved
  • Proof requests pause production until approval is received
PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Payment & Ordering Options for Agriculture Signs

Agriculture yard signs must be paid in full prior to production to ensure timely processing of your farm business signage.

Accepted Payment Methods

  • Credit Cards: Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover
  • Check Payments: Personal and business checks accepted - must be received before production begins

Your credit card will not be charged until you have reviewed and approved your agriculture yard sign order. This ensures you have complete control over your final design and specifications before production begins.

Check Payment Process

For check payments, your agriculture sign order will enter production once payment is received and processed. Learn more about our check payment process for detailed information on mailing instructions and processing times.

Order Approval Process

All agriculture yard sign orders require customer approval before production. You'll receive order confirmation with design preview, pricing, and shipping information for your review. Production begins only after you approve all order details.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Guidelines for Agriculture Yard Sign Delivery

For any shipping questions regarding your agriculture yard signs, contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 prior to placing your order.

Standard Shipping Information

  • Default Method: UPS Ground unless otherwise specified
  • Coverage: 1-3 day ground delivery to 90% of the United States
  • Tracking: Tracking number provided once agriculture signs ship
  • Pricing: Determined by package weight and destination

Available Shipping Methods

  • Standard: 3-5 Business Days
  • Three Day: 3 Business Days
  • Two Day: 2 Business Days
  • Overnight: 1 Business Day
  • UPS Overnight AM: Morning delivery
  • Economy Shipping: Additional 5-10 days (include P.O. Box information in Address Two field)

Production Facilities

Agriculture yard signs are produced in our Minnesota or Las Vegas facilities, selected based on your location and product specifications for optimal delivery experience.

Shipping Terms & Conditions

  • Large orders may incur additional shipping charges
  • Shipping company terms apply for lost or delayed packages after shipment
  • Natural disasters and circumstances beyond our control do not qualify for shipping refunds
  • Damaged goods must be returned for replacement
  • Lost packages replaced after shipping company confirms loss (7-10 business days)

International Shipping

International customers must provide shipping labels and customs documentation. We accept international labels from USPS and UPS only. Contact customer service for detailed international shipping requirements.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Common Uses for Agriculture Yard Signs

Agriculture yard signs serve multiple promotional and informational purposes for farm businesses, agricultural operations, and rural enterprises.

Farm Business Promotion

  • Farm Stand Advertising: Promote fresh produce, seasonal crops, and farm products
  • Pick-Your-Own Operations: Advertise strawberry picking, apple orchards, pumpkin patches
  • Farmers Market Displays: Professional signage for market booth identification
  • Farm Tours & Events: Direct visitors to farm tour starting points and special events

Agricultural Services

  • Equipment Sales: Advertise tractors, implements, and farm equipment for sale
  • Custom Farming Services: Promote harvesting, planting, and field work services
  • Livestock Operations: Advertise breeding services, livestock sales, hay and feed
  • Agricultural Contracting: Promote land clearing, excavation, and farm construction

Property & Land Use

  • Farm Property Sales: Professional real estate signage for agricultural land
  • Land Rental: Advertise available farmland for rent or lease
  • Property Boundaries: Mark property lines and agricultural zones
  • Access Control: No trespassing and authorized personnel only signs

Seasonal & Event Marketing

  • Harvest Festivals: Promote corn mazes, hayrides, and fall activities
  • Holiday Sales: Christmas trees, pumpkins, and seasonal decorations
  • Farm Education: School group tours and agricultural education programs
  • Community Events: Farm-to-table dinners, barn weddings, rural celebrations
PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Artwork Requirements for Agriculture Yard Sign Printing

Proper artwork preparation ensures the highest quality printing results for your agriculture yard signs.

Preferred File Formats

  • Vector Files (.eps): Best quality - convert text to outlines before submitting
  • PDF Files: High-resolution PDFs with embedded fonts and images
  • High-Resolution Images: .TIFF or .JPG files at 300 DPI or higher resolution
  • File Size Limit: 60 MB maximum - call for larger file instructions

Design Specifications

  • Resolution: 300 DPI minimum for crisp text and image reproduction
  • Color Mode: CMYK color mode for accurate color reproduction
  • Bleed Area: Include 1/8" bleed if designing for full-bleed printing
  • Text Size: Minimum 12pt text for readability from typical viewing distances

Professional Design Assistance

Our professional graphic designers can help create your agriculture yard sign design. Simply upload reference images, logos, or text content and provide specific instructions about your farm business promotional goals.

Artwork Proofing Options

  • Order Proofs: Review low-resolution image with order summary before production
  • Color Match Proofs: For color-critical agriculture branding - contact customer service
  • Design Consultation: Work directly with designers for custom agriculture sign layouts

If you're unsure about your file quality or have questions about agriculture sign design requirements, our professional graphic designers are available to assist with your project.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Custom Agriculture Yard Signs for Your Farm Business

Custom agriculture yard signs are essential marketing tools for farm businesses, agricultural operations, and rural enterprises. Whether you're promoting your farmers market stand, advertising seasonal produce, or directing visitors to your farm tours, professional yard signs deliver cost-effective visibility for your agricultural business.

Our agriculture signs feature full-color digital printing on weatherproof 4mm corrugated plastic material designed to withstand outdoor farm conditions. From promoting fresh produce sales to advertising pick-your-own operations, these lightweight yet durable signs are perfect for temporary and semi-permanent agricultural advertising.

Why Agriculture Businesses Choose Banners.com

  • Farm-Focused Experience: We understand the unique promotional needs of agricultural businesses
  • Weather-Resistant Materials: Durable signs that perform in all outdoor farm conditions
  • Fast Production: 1-5 day turnaround options to meet your agricultural event deadlines
  • Professional Design Support: Expert designers familiar with agricultural marketing
  • Complete Installation Solutions: Stakes, zip ties, and hardware for easy setup

Start designing your agriculture yard signs today using our professional templates, upload your own artwork, or work with our design team to create custom signage that promotes your farm business effectively.

Ready to promote your agricultural business? Select your design method above and start creating professional agriculture yard signs that drive customers to your farm operation.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions - Agriculture Yard Signs

What material are agriculture yard signs made from?

Agriculture yard signs are printed on 4mm white corrugated plastic (coroplast) material. This waterproof, lightweight, and durable material is specifically chosen for outdoor farm applications and withstands various weather conditions while maintaining vibrant print quality.

How long do agriculture yard signs last outdoors?

Agriculture yard signs are designed for temporary to semi-permanent outdoor display. The corrugated plastic material and UV-resistant inks provide excellent durability for seasonal farm promotions, with typical outdoor life of 6-12 months depending on weather exposure.

What sizes are available for agriculture yard signs?

Agriculture yard signs are available in multiple sizes from 12" x 12" up to 48" x 96". Popular farm business sizes include 18" x 24", 24" x 36", and 48" x 48". Custom sizes are also available for specific agricultural applications.

Can I get double-sided agriculture signs?

Yes, agriculture yard signs can be printed single-sided or double-sided. Double-sided signs provide maximum visibility for farm stands, directional signage, and agricultural events where the sign may be viewed from multiple directions.

What installation options are available?

Agriculture yard signs include several installation options: H-stakes for ground mounting, beefy stakes for windy conditions, zip ties for fence attachment, and various mounting hardware. Stakes are available in different sizes to accommodate your specific sign dimensions.

Do you offer design services for agriculture signs?

Yes, our professional graphic designers specialize in creating agriculture yard sign designs. You can upload your own artwork, choose from our agriculture templates, or work with our design team to create custom signage for your farm business.

What's the turnaround time for agriculture yard signs?

Agriculture yard signs offer flexible production times: 1-day priority, 2-day express, 3-day standard (most popular), and 5-day saver options. Choose the timeline that best fits your agricultural event or promotional schedule.

Are agriculture yard signs suitable for farmers markets?

Absolutely! Agriculture yard signs are perfect for farmers market displays. They're lightweight for easy transport, weather-resistant for outdoor markets, and feature full-color printing to showcase your farm products and branding professionally.

Can large agriculture signs be shipped flat?

Signs larger than 32" x 48" are automatically scored and folded for efficient shipping. If you need oversized agriculture signs shipped flat, contact our customer service team about our oversized flat shipping options.

What file formats do you accept for agriculture sign artwork?

We accept .eps files (preferred), high-resolution .PDF, .TIFF, and .JPG files at 300 DPI or higher. Vector files with outlined text provide the best print quality for agriculture yard signs. Files must be under 60 MB.
